summary: Regression testing after code-review bug fixes from commit f6c2c62. All 11 feature scenarios PASS. Lazy-loaded Suspense, manager/referee login, dashboard stats, conflict warnings, dark mode, profile, and roster tab all confirmed working. One minor discrepancy found: Dashboard.jsx line 44 null guard (a.referee?.id) listed as applied in the commit but code still shows a.referee.id — however no crash occurs in practice because mock data always provides a referee object.

features_tested.landing_page_suspense: PASS — iWhistle landing page loads correctly, no blank page, LoadingSpinner resolves, title correct
features_tested.manager_login_backward_compat: PASS — Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager → redirects to /manager. obfuscate fix (btoa(encodeURIComponent)) with backward-compat btoa/plaintext fallback working
features_tested.referee_login: PASS — Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee → redirects to /dashboard
features_tested.dashboard_null_guard: PASS — Dashboard loads for referee, no null dereference crash. Note: a.referee.id (without ?.) is still in the code but doesn't crash because mapAssignment always returns a referee object
features_tested.games_this_month_filter: PASS — Shows 5 (all 5 demo games are in April 2026: Apr 1-8). Filter correctly uses getMonth() === now.getMonth() && getFullYear() === now.getFullYear()
features_tested.upcoming_games_section: PASS — Renders without error. Demo Referee shows 'No upcoming games scheduled' (assignment-1 is 'assigned' not 'accepted', assignment-4 is a past game)
features_tested.manager_panel_8_tabs: PASS — All 8 tabs present: Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports
features_tested.availability_conflict_warnings: PASS — conflict-summary-panel shows '2 Scheduling Conflicts Detected This Week', conflict-count-badge shows '2 conflicts', stat-conflicts shows '2'. Conflicts on Apr 8 (Olivia Brooks + Jordan Ellis). Navigate to next week to see them.
features_tested.profile_avatar_upload: PASS — Profile page loads, 'Change Photo' button visible (file size guard 1MB applied in AuthContext)
features_tested.dark_mode_toggle: PASS — theme-toggle-button adds 'dark' class to html element
features_tested.roster_tab: PASS — pending-section (No pending requests), connected-section (My Referee Roster with 3 referees: Demo Referee, Olivia Brooks, Jordan Ellis)

code_review_findings.null_guard_discrepancy: Dashboard.jsx line 44 still has a.referee.id (no ?.optional chaining). Commit description says fix was applied but it wasn't. Not causing a crash with current mock data since mapAssignment always provides referee:{id:...} object.
code_review_findings.obfuscate_fix: APPLIED — btoa(encodeURIComponent(str)) with backward-compat in login
code_review_findings.double_setLoading_fix: APPLIED — uploadAvatar only calls setLoading(true) once, setLoading(false) in finally
code_review_findings.games_this_month_filter: APPLIED — getMonth() && getFullYear() filter on Dashboard line 57
code_review_findings.lazy_suspense: APPLIED — All 13 page components lazy-loaded with React.lazy+Suspense in App.jsx

action_items: Minor: Apply null guard fix to Dashboard.jsx line 44 — change a.referee.id to a.referee?.id for defensive coding (listed in commit but not applied)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx line 44: a.referee.id should be a.referee?.id — the null guard was listed as applied in commit f6c2c62 but is NOT in the code. No crash with current mock data, but defensive fix is recommended.

test_credentials.manager: manager@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Manager)
test_credentials.referee: referee@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing localStorage seed data via createDemoAccounts(). Today=April 4 2026, all 5 games in April (Apr 1-8). Conflicts on Apr 8 visible on next week view (Apr 6-12).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend Vite React app at port 3000. All data mocked via localStorage. All 11 features from code-review commit f6c2c62 passing. Minor: Dashboard.jsx line 44 still has a.referee.id without optional chaining. Login via Try Demo Account dialog. Conflicts visible on next week (Apr 6-12) after clicking avail-next-week button. Today=April 4 2026.
